signal: Contractors Züblin, SalfaCorp and Constructora Gardilcic received penalties for safety procedure violations after a deadly collapse at El Teniente mine
source_context: According to inspection records obtained through public information requests, contractors Züblin, SalfaCorp and Constructora Gardilcic received higher penalties than Codelco after violations related to safety procedures and accident reporting.
